name: Spring Boot baseline
acceptance: GET /api/health returns status=ok

name: Project create/read API
acceptance: POST /api/projects and GET /api/projects/{id} work

name: Vue3 scaffold and router
acceptance: Vue app boots with defined routes

name: Pinia stores for project/job/llm/ui
acceptance: State survives refresh and route changes

name: Workspace pages and editors
acceptance: Scene/panel edits can be saved and displayed

name: Model settings and metrics pages
acceptance: Can enable providers and view runtime metrics

name: Harness orchestrator S1-S7
acceptance: Step outputs and metrics are persisted

name: Retry/resume/versioning/SSE
acceptance: Failed steps can resume and stream events

name: Unified LlmClient contract
acceptance: All providers implement chat/structured/stream

name: Model registry and routing policy
acceptance: Step-level routing can be configured

name: OpenAI adapter
acceptance: OpenAI call works in one harness step

name: Anthropic adapter
acceptance: Anthropic call works in one harness step

name: Gemini adapter
acceptance: Gemini call works in one harness step

name: Azure OpenAI adapter
acceptance: Azure OpenAI call works in one harness step

name: OpenAI-compatible adapter
acceptance: Custom baseURL providers are supported

name: Ollama local adapter
acceptance: Local model can be used as fallback

name: Fallback chain and retry
acceptance: Primary failure triggers secondary/fallback

name: Circuit breaker and rate limiter
acceptance: Provider faults are isolated

name: JSON schema output enforcement
acceptance: Invalid outputs are retried or repaired

name: Token/cost metering
acceptance: Each step tracks token usage and cost

name: Budget guardrails
acceptance: Over-budget requests trigger downgrade policy

name: Provider and route management APIs
acceptance: Frontend can configure providers/routes

name: Gateway audit and redaction
acceptance: No secrets in logs

name: Storage abstraction and migration path
acceptance: File and DB modes can be switched

name: Metrics and alerting
acceptance: Provider/model/step metrics are queryable

name: Provider compatibility matrix tests
acceptance: All enabled providers pass smoke scenarios

name: Failover and chaos tests
acceptance: Injected failures trigger fallback reliably

name: End-to-end workflow tests
acceptance: Create->generate->edit->export passes

name: Unified init script
acceptance: One command validates full stack startup

name: CI/CD pipeline
acceptance: PR checks include lint/test/e2e
